div1.entryFree: Bran, the husks separated from the flour by bolting: to dine and sup with water and b. Meas. IV, 3, 160. fast a week with b. and water, LLL I, 1, 303. chaff and b. Troil. I, 2, 262. leave me but the b. Cor. I, 1, 149. meal and b. together he throws, III, 1, 322. nature hath meal and b. Cymb. IV, 2, 27.
